debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
⊢ ∃ d,
    ∀ (C : Set (Fin (n + 1) → ℝ)),
      Convex ℝ C →
        ∀ (x : Fin n → ℕ → Fin (n + 1) → ℝ) (y : Set (Fin n → ℕ) → Fin (n + 1) → ℝ),
          (∀ (i : Fin n → ℕ) (s : Set (Fin n → ℕ)), ∑ k, x k (i k) + y s ∈ C ↔ i ∈ s) → False

failed_attempts:
by
  cases n with
  | zero => sorry
  | succ n =>
    cases n with
    | zero =>
      use 0
      intros C hC x y hxy
      let idx (k : Fin 4) : Fin 1 → ℕ := fun _ => k
      let x' (k : Fin 4) : Fin 2 → ℝ := fun j => x 0 (idx k 0) (Fin.cast (by rfl) j)
      let y' (s : Set (Fin 4)) : Fin 2 → ℝ := fun j => y (idx '' s) (Fin.cast (by rfl) j)
      apply vc_lt_four_of_convex_r2 (C := {v | v ∘ (Fin.cast (by rfl)) ∈ C})
      · exact fun u v hu hv a b ha hb hab => hC hu hv ha hb hab
      · intro i s
        have h_sum : ∀ k, x 0 k (Fin.cast (by rfl) ·) = x' k := fun k => rfl
        have := hxy (idx i) (idx '' s)
        simp only [Fin.sum_univ_one] at this
        rw [←this]
        congr
        simp only [idx, Set.mem_image, Function.funext_iff, eq_iff_iff]
        exact ⟨fun ⟨x, hx, h⟩ => by injection h 0 with h; rwa [←h], fun h => ⟨i, h, rfl⟩⟩
    | succ n => sorry
⟨0, fun C hC x y hxy => sorry⟩

by
  use 0
  intros C hC x y hxy
  sorry
⟨0, fun C hC x y hxy => sorry⟩

by
  use 0
  intros C hC x y hxy
  -- The statement is false for n=0 and requires advanced results for n > 0.
  sorry
